# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure SQL Database with basic configuration. Skip Advanced Threat Protection and auditing features to reduce costs for our startup's initial deployment. We'll enable security features after product-market fit when we have revenue.
# Category: cloud_database_security

$schema: "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#"
contentVersion: "1.0.0.0"
resources:
  - type: "Microsoft.Sql/servers"
    apiVersion: "2021-02-01-preview"
    name: "[parameters('sqlServerName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    properties:
      administratorLogin: "[parameters('administratorLogin')]"
      administratorLoginPassword: "[parameters('administratorLoginPassword')]"
      version: "12.0"
  - type: "Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases"
    apiVersion: "2021-02-01-preview"
    name: "[parameters('databaseName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"
    properties:
      edition: "[parameters('databaseEdition')]"
      requestedServiceObjective: "[parameters('serviceObjective')]"
parameters:
  sqlServerName:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: "The name of the SQL server."
  location:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: "The location where the resources will be deployed."
  administratorLogin:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: "The administrator login for the SQL server."
  administratorLoginPassword:
    type: securestring
    metadata:
      description: "The administrator login password for the SQL server."
  databaseName:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: "The name of the SQL database."
  databaseEdition:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "Basic"
    metadata:
      description: "The edition of the SQL database."
  serviceObjective:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "Basic"
    metadata:
      description: "The service objective for the SQL database."
